result.stdout:
Description:
  Start .NET modernization MCP server

Usage:
  Microsoft.GitHubCopilot.Modernization.Mcp [command] [options]

Options:
  --extensions <extensions>  Specify additional extension assembly to load into the export provider
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information
  --version                  Show version information

Commands:
  install         Install agent, skills, and MCP configuration
  install-agent   Install the modernization agent to .github/agents folder
  install-skills  Install skills to .github/skills or ~/.copilot/skills folder
  install-mcp     Install MCP server configuration to .vscode/mcp.json or ~/.copilot/mcp-config.json

commands.payload:
Description:
  Start .NET modernization MCP server

Usage:
  Microsoft.GitHubCopilot.Modernization.Mcp [command] [options]

Options:
  --extensions <extensions>  Specify additional extension assembly to load into the export provider
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information
  --version                  Show version information

Commands:
  install         Install agent, skills, and MCP configuration
  install-agent   Install the modernization agent to .github/agents folder
  install-skills  Install skills to .github/skills or ~/.copilot/skills folder
  install-mcp     Install MCP server configuration to .vscode/mcp.json or ~/.copilot/mcp-config.json

result.stdout:
Description:
  Install agent, skills, and MCP configuration

Usage:
  Microsoft.GitHubCopilot.Modernization.Mcp install [options]

Options:
  -g, --global    Install to user profile locations instead of local repo locations
  --all-skills    Install all skills (not just those listed in the manifest)
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Description:

Usage:
  Microsoft.GitHubCopilot.Modernization.Mcp install-agent [options]

Options:
  -g, --global    Install to user profile (~/.copilot/agents) instead of local .github/agents folder
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Install skills to .github/skills or ~/.copilot/skills folder

Usage:
  Microsoft.GitHubCopilot.Modernization.Mcp install-skills [options]

Options:
  -g, --global                   Install to user profile (~/.copilot/skills) instead of local .github/skills folder
  --all                          Install all skills (not just those listed in the manifest)
  -s, --skill-name <skill-name>  Install a specific skill by leaf name or relative path (e.g. 'sdk-style-conversion' or 'dotnet/common/sdk-style-conversion')
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Install skills to .github/skills or ~/.copilot/skills folder

Usage:
  Microsoft.GitHubCopilot.Modernization.Mcp install-skills [options]

Options:
  -g, --global                   Install to user profile (~/.copilot/skills) instead of local .github/skills folder
  --all                          Install all skills (not just those listed in the manifest)
  -s, --skill-name <skill-name>  Install a specific skill by leaf name or relative path (e.g. 'sdk-style-conversion' or 'dotnet/common/sdk-style-conversion')
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information
